name: Tom Gleeson
blurb: He gained wide prominence in the 2010s as a panellist on the ABC satire The Weekly with Charlie Pickering, where his Hard Chat segment became a signature, and went on to create and host the quiz comedy series Hard Quiz.
bio: Tom Gleeson is an Australian stand-up comedian and television and radio presenter known for his blunt, deadpan delivery and confrontational interview style. He gained wide prominence in the 2010s as a panellist on the ABC satire The Weekly with Charlie Pickering, where his Hard Chat segment became a signature, and went on to create and host the quiz comedy series Hard Quiz. He won the Gold Logie in 2019 and later hosted Taskmaster Australia.

timeline.ev: Sketch comedy on Network Ten skitHOUSE
Joins The Weekly with Charlie Pickering on ABC
Creates and hosts Hard Quiz on ABC
Hosts the first season of Taskmaster Australia

accolades: Gold Logie Award for Most Popular Personality, 2019
Creator and host of the long-running Hard Quiz
